title: Publication of reports
doc_html:
§287.  Publication of reports

Any parish governing authority may, in its own discretion, publish any of the reports which it receives as a result of R.S. 42:283.
doc_text:
§287.  Publication of reports
Any parish governing authority may, in its own discretion, publish any of the reports which it receives as a result of R.S. 42:283.
